command: export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="reviewer" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="SMARTPACKDEBT" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="inexon" && export AGENT_CYCLE="1" && source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init && agent_log_event "read-diff" '{"commit":"4126d41152221fd6db1a3fadb6fbf2e4b2c99024"}' && agent_log_event "read-card" '{"card_id":"inexon"}' && agent_log_event "write-review" '{"verdict":"REJECTION"}'

ls scripts/agent-log.sh 2>/dev/null && ls -d .gitban/agents/executor/inbox .gitban/agents/planner/inbox .gitban/agents/router/logs 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; mkdir -p .gitban/agents/executor/inbox .gitban/agents/planner/inbox .gitban/agents/router/logs 2>/dev/null; echo "DIRS_READY"
